refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall analyze the worksite area to identify terrain features, detect obstacles, and represent the work-zone accurately.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is decomposed into specific analysis tasks to clarify the scope and enable targeted design solutions for terrain, obstacles, and work-zone representation.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by comparing generated worksite models/maps against ground truth data and stakeholder validation for terrain accuracy, obstacle detection, and work-zone representation completeness.
sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite
Generate and represent the work-zone area accurately

candidate_dps: Terrain analysis algorithm using LIDAR and sensor fusion
Obstacle detection and classification module using computer vision and sensor data
Work-zone mapping and representation engine integrating terrain and obstacle data
selected_dp.selected_dp: Integrated worksite analysis system combining terrain analysis, obstacle detection, and work-zone mapping modules

potential_sources: Data dependencies between terrain and obstacle modules
Integration complexity of work-zone representation with terrain and obstacle data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically integrates sub-functions with manageable coupling through well-defined data flows.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of high-quality sensor data (LIDAR, cameras)
Risk of sensor data inaccuracies affecting model quality
High safety criticality requires robust error handling and validation
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing obstacle detection and terrain analysis to reduce integration complexity if coupling issues arise.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Realizes the integrated worksite analysis system including terrain, obstacle, and work-zone mapping functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data streams (LIDAR, cameras) for terrain and obstacle analysis

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends processed worksite model data to planning and execution modules

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange with remote modules and teleoperation systems

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as the integrated analysis logically belongs here; low diffusion as functionality is centralized.
Low containment; vehicle module focuses on mobility and control, not worksite analysis.
Minimal containment; teleoperation focuses on control interfaces, not analysis.
Some overlap possible for safety-related alerts but primary analysis belongs to NGHE Solution.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing worksite analysis in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership and interface management.
containment_risks: Potential overload of NGHE Solution module if analysis complexity grows
Interface coordination with Safety Services for safety-critical alerts needs clear definition
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor module size and consider splitting analysis submodules if complexity or diffusion increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes the original requirement into manageable sub-functions; selected DP logically addresses these with integrated modules.

diffusion_risks: Potential diffusion if NGHE Solution module grows too large
Interface coordination with Safety Services requires attention
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support NGHE Solution as primary owner; diffusion is low but should be monitored.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by testing the integrated worksite model outputs and interface data flows.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FR to DP and IM with explicit interfaces and ownership.

recommended_revisions: Define interface protocols with Safety Services for safety alerts related to worksite hazards
Plan for modularization if NGHE Solution module complexity increases

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet requirements with clear ownership and manageable coupling; no immediate need to zigzag or revise.
next_level_sub_frs: Analyze terrain features of the worksite area
Detect and classify obstacles within the worksite
Generate and represent the work-zone area accurately

revise.why: No significant issues identified requiring revision at this level

assumptions: NGHE Solution module can handle integrated analysis complexity
open_risks: Sensor data inaccuracies impacting model quality
Interface coordination with Safety Services for safety alerts
evidence_needed: Validation of sensor data quality and processing accuracy
Interface definition and testing results with Safety Services
